SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.fielddevelopment.integrated

Class GasLiftPerformanceCurve

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.fielddevelopment.integrated.GasLiftPerformanceCurve
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class GasLiftPerformanceCurve extends Object implements Serializable
Gas-lift performance curve (GLPC) relating injected lift-gas rate to produced oil rate.

A gas-lifted well shows a characteristic response: as lift-gas rate increases the produced oil rate first rises (reduced flowing gradient) then falls (excess friction from the added gas), passing through a single optimum. This class stores that response either as tabulated points or as a smooth parametric form

q_oil(q_lift) = q_base + a√q_lift - b·q_lift

which has a unique maximum at q_lift* = (a / 2b)². The incremental slope dq_oil/dq_lift is used by GasLiftNetworkOptimizer to allocate a limited lift-gas budget across wells by the equal-slope (Lagrangian) optimality criterion.

Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim
See Also:

    Returns the base oil rate at zero lift.

    Returns the incremental oil-per-lift slope (dq_oil/dq_lift) at a given lift-gas rate.

  • Constructor Details

    • GasLiftPerformanceCurve

      public GasLiftPerformanceCurve(double baseOilRateSm3PerDay, double coeffA, double coeffB, double maxLiftRateSm3PerDay)
      Creates a parametric gas-lift performance curve.
      Parameters:
      baseOilRateSm3PerDay - oil rate at zero lift in Sm3/day
      coeffA - square-root response coefficient (> 0)
      coeffB - linear friction-penalty coefficient (> 0)
      maxLiftRateSm3PerDay - maximum lift-gas rate in Sm3/day

    • GasLiftPerformanceCurve

      public GasLiftPerformanceCurve(double[] liftRatesSm3PerDay, double[] oilRatesSm3PerDay)
      Creates a tabulated gas-lift performance curve.
      Parameters:
      liftRatesSm3PerDay - lift-gas rates in Sm3/day, strictly ascending; length ≥ 2
      oilRatesSm3PerDay - corresponding oil rates in Sm3/day

  • Method Details

    • oilRateAt

      public double oilRateAt(double liftRateSm3PerDay)
      Returns the produced oil rate at a given lift-gas rate.
      Parameters:
      liftRateSm3PerDay - lift-gas rate in Sm3/day
      Returns:
      oil rate in Sm3/day

    • incrementalSlope

      public double incrementalSlope(double liftRateSm3PerDay)
      Returns the incremental oil-per-lift slope (dq_oil/dq_lift) at a given lift-gas rate.
      Parameters:
      liftRateSm3PerDay - lift-gas rate in Sm3/day
      Returns:
      incremental slope (dimensionless, Sm3 oil per Sm3 lift)

    • optimalLiftRate

      public double optimalLiftRate()
      Returns the lift-gas rate that maximises produced oil (the GLPC peak).
      Returns:
      optimal lift-gas rate in Sm3/day

    • getMaxLiftRate

      public double getMaxLiftRate()
      Returns the maximum allowed lift-gas rate.
      Returns:
      maximum lift-gas rate in Sm3/day

    • getBaseOilRate

      public double getBaseOilRate()
      Returns the base oil rate at zero lift.
      Returns:
      base oil rate in Sm3/day
